ItacPersonItem.Notes: Several of his letters to the Bolognese Camillo Vizzani, with comments about each other`s poems, are in the Harry Ransom Center, Ranuzzi MSS, Ph12670. He signs as Camillo Cocchi. Details about his provenance are in Gio. Mario Crescimbeni, Comentarii del canonico .... intorno alla sua istoria della volgar poesia, volume IV (Venice: Basegio, 1730), p. 117.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
